name: Distinction

phase_0.boundary_condition: The Law of Crossing (the limit of the space of the mark)

VINIT.justification: The void before any distinction is drawn; the space without a boundary.

TANCH.justification: The final enclosure that defines the universe of discourse; the closure of the distinction.

AFWD.justification: The act of severing the space to create an 'inside' and an 'outside'.

AREV.justification: Returning from the marked state to the unmarked state; the inverse of the indication.

CLINK.justification: The composition of a distinction within its own space; nesting boundaries.

IMSCRIB.justification: The mark that refers to itself as a mark; the identity of the boundary.

FSPLIT.justification: Splitting the unmarked state into the 'this' (T) and the 'not-this' (F).

FFUSE.justification: The collapse of the boundary where the two sides are seen as the original unity of the space.

EVALT.justification: The positive, marked side of the distinction; the value indicated.

EVALF.justification: The negative, unmarked side; the background against which the mark is made.

ENGAGR.justification: The line itself which is both inside and outside; the shared edge of the distinction.

IFIX.justification: The permanent establishment of the distinction as a foundational truth for the system.

phase_3.void_description: The state before any distinction is made; pure potentiality.
phase_3.true_description: The state of being indicated; the presence of the mark.
phase_3.false_description: The state of being excluded; the absence of the mark.
phase_3.both_description: The state of the boundary itself; the paradox of the limit.

steps.domain_action: The primordial unmarked space is established.
A boundary is drawn, severing the space.
The space bifurcates into two distinct domains.
The 'Inside' is identified as the primary value.
The 'Inside' recognizes itself as the marked state.
The first mark is recorded as a permanent distinction.
The 'Outside' is identified as the void/background.
The observer holds both the inside and outside in a single view of the boundary.
The distinction is collapsed, reuniting the sides.
The result of the collapse is composed with the original space.
The system is closed within the Law of Crossing.

phase_5.compiler_frontend: The Observer (the one who draws the distinction)
phase_5.memory_mechanism: The Form (the shape of the distinctions made)
phase_5.scheduler_mechanism: The Sequence of Indications (the order of drawing)
phase_5.alfs_store: Laws of Form (Spencer-Brown's calculus of indications)

phase_6.cycle_cost: Attention (the energy required to maintain the mark)
phase_6.delta_s_verdict: ΔS ≈ 0 — The information created by the mark is exactly balanced by the exclusion of the background.

lean_scaffold:
-- IGProtocol scaffold: VINIT → AFWD → FSPLIT → EVALT → IMSCRIB → IFIX → AREV → EVALF → ENGAGR → FFUSE → CLINK → TANCH
-- Class: Distinction
-- Fingerprint: sig=(6,2,3,1)
--   self_ref=False | frobenius_order=1
--   dialetheia_complete=True | period=12
-- Expected tier: O₂
-- FSPLIT/FFUSE pairs: [(2, 9)]

import Imscribing.IGMorphism
import Imscribing.IGFunctor

namespace Imscribing
open Primitives Frobenius IGProtocol
open Dimensionality Topology Relational Polarity Grammar
     Fidelity KineticChar Granularity Criticality Protection Stoichiometry Chirality

-- ── Token → IG field mapping ──────────────────────────────────────────────
--   [0] VINIT     dim    := 𐑼               𐑼 → 𐑾  | initial object — ground of distinction
--   [1] AFWD      rel    := 𐑾               𐑼 → 𐑚  | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow
--   [2] FSPLIT    gran   := 𐑚               𐑚 → 𐑚  | split δ — range decomposition
--   [3] EVALT     crit   := ⊙               𐑚 → 𐑙  | evaluate-true — criticality gate open
--   [4] IMSCRIB   gram   := 𐑠               𐑚 → 𐑙  | identity — self-imscription
--   [5] IFIX      prot   := 𐑭               𐑚 → 𐑙  | irreversible fixation — winding number
--   [6] AREV      pol    := 𐑗               𐑚 → 𐑙  | reverse morphism — parity flip
--   [7] EVALF     chir   := 𐑖               𐑚 → 𐑙  | evaluate-false — chirality check
--   [8] ENGAGR    stoi   := 𐑳               𐑚 → 𐑙  | engage paradox — B-state, both arms
--   [9] FFUSE     stoi   := 𐑙               𐑙 → 𐑱  | fuse μ — assembly mode
--   [10] CLINK     fid    := 𐑱               𐑙 → 𐑡  | composition — regime coherence
--   [11] TANCH     top    := 𐑡               𐑱 → 𐑼  | terminal object — connectivity boundary

-- ── Main IGProtocol term ────────────────────────────────────────────────────

noncomputable def distinction_protocol : IGProtocol 𐑼 𐑡 :=
  .withGram 𐑠 <|
  -- Seq chain:
  (.arrow 𐑼 𐑼 𐑾)  -- [0] VINIT | dim := 𐑼 | initial object — ground of distinction (The primordial unmarked space is established.)
  (.arrow 𐑾 𐑼 𐑚)  -- [1] AFWD | rel := 𐑾 | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow (A boundary is drawn, severing the space.)
  -- FSPLIT [2] (gran := 𐑚) (The space bifurcates into two distinct domains.) / FFUSE [9] (stoi := 𐑙)
  .seq
    (.prod
      -- T-branch (4 nodes)
      .seq
        (.arrow ⊙ 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [3] EVALT | crit := ⊙ | evaluate-true — criticality gate open (The 'Inside' is identified as the primary value.)
      .seq
        (.arrow 𐑠 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [4] IMSCRIB | gram := 𐑠 | identity — self-imscription (The 'Inside' recognizes itself as the marked state.)
      .seq
        (.arrow 𐑭 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [5] IFIX | prot := 𐑭 | irreversible fixation — winding number (The first mark is recorded as a permanent distinction.)
        (.arrow 𐑗 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [6] AREV | pol := 𐑗 | reverse morphism — parity flip (The gaze turns toward the 'Outside'.)
      -- F-branch (2 nodes)
      .seq
        (.arrow 𐑖 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [7] EVALF | chir := 𐑖 | evaluate-false — chirality check (The 'Outside' is identified as the void/background.)
        (.arrow 𐑳 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [8] ENGAGR | stoi := 𐑳 | engage paradox — B-state, both arms (The observer holds both the inside and outside in a single view of the boundary.))
    -- reconnect at FFUSE [9]: μ closes the Frobenius pair
    (.arrow 𐑙 𐑙 𐑱)  -- [9] FFUSE | stoi := 𐑙 (The distinction is collapsed, reuniting the sides.)
  (.arrow 𐑱 𐑙 𐑡)  -- [10] CLINK | fid := 𐑱 | composition — regime coherence (The result of the collapse is composed with the original space.)
  (.arrow 𐑡 𐑱 𐑼)  -- [11] TANCH | top := 𐑡 | terminal object — connectivity boundary (The system is closed within the Law of Crossing.)

-- ── Evaluation arm sub-defs ─────────────────────────────────────────────────

-- truth arm
noncomputable def distinction_true_arm : IGProtocol 𐑼 𐑡 :=
  (distinction_protocol).restrictToEVALT

-- false arm
noncomputable def distinction_false_arm : IGProtocol 𐑼 𐑡 :=
  (distinction_protocol).restrictToEVALF

-- ── Verification theorems ───────────────────────────────────────────────────

theorem distinction_tier : TierFunctor.obj 𐑼 = .O₂ := by decide

-- Frobenius (split → fuse): μ∘δ = id on .prod branch
-- Proof: apply igFrobAlg_self_fusion; exact mu_delta_A_id
-- (requires mu_delta_A_id from IGFunctor library)

end Imscribing
